0.original: Joe Salesman, Joe Executive, Joe Professional Worker, Josephine Housewife. 2 00:00:05,920 --> 00:00:10,931 They all often try to build strength and get ready with office chats, 3 00:00:10,960 --> 00:00:18,051 coffee breaks, sharpening pencils, reading, personal business, getting the desk cleared off, TV, 4 00:00:18,080 --> 00:00:20,931 and dozens of other little escape devices. 5 00:00:21,841 --> 00:00:24,051 But there's a way to break this habit. 6 00:00:24,160 --> 00:00:28,451 Tell yourself, I'm in condition right now to begin. 7 00:00:28,640 --> 00:00:31,091 I can't gain a thing by putting it off. 8 00:00:31,361 --> 00:00:36,130 I'll use the get ready time and energy to get going instead. 9 00:00:37,440 --> 00:00:46,451 What we want more than anything else in our business, an executive in a machine tool company said in an address to a group of sales executives, 10 00:00:46,720 --> 00:00:51,011 is more people who get sound ideas and then push them through. 11 00:00:51,361 --> 00:00:57,331 There's not one job in our production and marketing setup that can't be done better, a lot better. 12 00:00:57,520 --> 00:01:00,770 I don't want to infer that we're not doing a good job now. 13 00:01:00,880 --> 00:01:01,571 We are.
0.b1: Whether you are a salesperson, an executive, a professional, or a homemaker, you often waste time preparing to work. You might chat, drink coffee, sharpen pencils, read, do personal tasks, clean your desk, or watch TV to avoid starting. These are just ways to escape work. However, you can stop this habit. Tell yourself: 'I am ready to start now. I gain nothing by waiting.' Use that time and energy to actually begin your work. An executive once told a group that they need people who have good ideas and follow through with them. He said every job in their company could be done much better. He did not mean they are doing a bad job; they are actually doing well.
0.cn: 无论你是销售员、主管、专业人士还是家庭主妇，你经常会花时间为工作做准备。你可能会通过聊天、喝咖啡、削铅笔、阅读、处理私事、清理桌面或看电视来逃避开始工作。这些只是逃避工作的手段。然而，你可以改掉这个习惯。告诉自己：“我现在就准备好开始了。拖延对我没有任何好处。”把准备的时间和精力直接投入到工作中去。一位高管曾对一群销售主管说，他们最需要的是那些有好的想法并能将其付诸实践的人。他说，公司生产和营销中的每一项工作都可以做得更好，甚至好得多。他并不是说他们现在做得不好，事实上他们做得不错。
0.ai_notes:
'Joe Salesman, Joe Executive': a way of using a common name to represent any person in a specific role.
'escape devices': activities used to avoid doing something difficult or important.
'break this habit': to stop doing something that you do regularly.
'putting it off': delaying or waiting to do something until a later time.
'get going': to start doing something or to begin moving.
'push them through': to complete a task or make sure an idea is actually finished and implemented.
'production and marketing setup': the way a company organizes its manufacturing and selling processes.
'infer': to suggest or imply something indirectly.
0.remarks:
'Joe Salesman, Joe Executive': 用一个普通的名字来代表特定职位的任何人。
'escape devices': 用来逃避做困难或重要事情的活动。
'break this habit': 改掉某种经常做的习惯。
'putting it off': 推迟或等待以后再做某事。
'get going': 开始做某事或开始行动。
'push them through': 完成一项任务，或确保一个想法真正被执行和落实。
'production and marketing setup': 公司组织其制造和销售流程的方式。
'infer': 间接地暗示或推断出某事。
